name: Dog Fest Meat Slices With Venison (90G)
description: Nature calling! The mix of venison and duck will let your dog experience what wildlife tastes like. Mouth-watering treats are just perfect for training or as a treat on the go. Composition: duck, venison, vegetable by-products, minerals. Analytical constituents, %: crude protein 28, crude fat 12, crude fiber 1, crude ash 5, moisture 21
